arts.ttl: Arsenal 'make approach' for £17.5m midfielder compared to Jude Bellingham, Steven Gerrard
arts.sum: Arsenal supposedly make an approach to sign Juventus midfielder Khephren Thuram, who has been likened to Jude Bellingham and Steven Gerrard.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid star rewarded for return to form with Player of the Month award
arts.sum: An often overlooked member of the starting XI at La Liga giants Real Madrid has on Friday been named the club’s Player of the Month for March. The player in…

arts.ttl: Fernandes to be sacrificed as Man Utd prepare €100m Real Madrid offer
arts.sum: Man Utd’s reported interest in Valverde follows speculation that Real Madrid will pursue a €106m (£90m) move for Red Devils captain Bruno Fernandes this summer. Fernandes has two years remaining on his current Man Utd contract and Ruben Amorim has insisted that he has no intention of allowing the Portugal star to depart during the 2025 summer transfer window .

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid player Canales injures his leg after kicking door in locker room argument
arts.sum: Former Real Madrid midfielder Sergio Canales has injured his left leg from kicking and breaking a crystal door after an argument with his Monterrey coach Martin Demichelis. According to the club on Friday, the disagreement and injury happened in the locker room after Thursday’s practice at the team’s training center.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe and Antonio Rudiger punished by UEFA but cleared for Arsenal game
arts.sum: Real Madrid can breathe a sigh of relief after their players will not face a ban from UEFA which would have ruled them out of the first leg of Champions League semi-final against Arsenal. It was announced last week that Dani Ceballos, Vinicius Junior, Kylian Mbappe and Antonio Rudiger were under investigation for their conduct […] The post Kylian Mbappe and Antonio Rudiger punished by UEFA but cleared for Arsenal game appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Olmo clearance doesn't mar LaLiga
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti does not believe the decision to allow Barcelona's Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor to continue playing for the club will taint any competition, with his team potentially facing Barça for three trophies.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid players fined but free to face Arsenal
arts.sum: Four Real Madrid players, including Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Jr, are cleared to face Arsenal in their Champions League quarter-final despite three being punished by Uefa.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti admits key Real Madrid star could be rested vs Valencia
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has revealed that he is considering leaving a star member of the club’s midfield on the bench in the club’s next outing. The player…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Valencia: Los Blancos teenager in line to make debut against Los Che
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Fran Gonzalez could make his first-team debut in Saturday's La Liga clash with Valencia.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn Antonio Rudiger & Kylian Mbappe suspension verdict for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: UEFA confirm the results of their investigation into Real Madrid ahead of the Champions League clash with Arsenal.
